Stations

Sea
Raw Bar — 5 Options
  • Tuna tartare, soy-sambal, guacamole, sesame, handmade cones
  • Salmon tartare, citrus, mint, capers, Calabrian chilli, puffed quinoa, taro chips
  • Salmon crudo spritz, Aperol, prosecco, orange, yuzu, Calabrian chili, basil oil, squid ink tuile
  • Tuna crudo, citrus emulsion, chilli, dill, Cerignola olive
  • Hamachi crudo, passion fruit & yuzu vinaigrette, chive, micro flowers
  • Beef tartare, French style, with crostini
  • Carpaccio di manzo, truffle Pecorino, torched cherry tomatoes, arugula

Vegan options available  ·  Additional options upon request

Premium Options

  • Jumbo Poached Shrimp, cocktail sauce
  • Seared Bay Scallop, prosciutto chutney
  • Shucked Oysters, mignonette, horseradish, lemon, hot sauce

  • Crab Claw, upon availability

Oyster Station
  • Shucked oysters with mignonette, horseradish, lemon, hot sauce
Sushi Station
  • An assortment of maki: tuna & salmon kamikaze, vegetarian, California & nigiri
Antipasto
Tuscan Antipasti Station
  • Prosciutto di Parma, bresaola & soppressata
  • Parmigiano Reggiano chunks with balsamic & olive oil
  • Duo of warm house-made focaccia with olives, chili & fresh herbs
  • Caprese spiedini — cherry tomato, mozzarella di bufala, fresh basil & olive
  • Bruschetta with crostini — onion crema, eggplant caviar
  • Marinated olives & giardiniera

Grilled vegetables  ·  Bitter greens salad  ·  Kale & Brussels sprout salad

Selection of 3 Italian Cheeses
  • Soft — Taleggio
  • Semi-firm — Manchego, Piave
  • Firm — Truffle Pecorino, Parmigiano Reggiano
  • Blue — Gorgonzola

Sit-Down Menus

Menu 1

Antipasto — Please select one

Beet carpaccio, goat cheese, blackberries, figs, red leaf lettuce, sunflower seeds, Chardonnay vinaigrette or Cream of cauliflower, parsnip chips, chili oil

Carne o Pesce — Guests choose between selected meat or fish via RSVP

Short rib (boneless), red wine braised, parsnip purée, heirloom carrots, broccolini, herb pangrattato or Grilled AAA Black Angus hanger steak, shallot, red wine sauce, baby potatoes, green beans or Salmone, green pea purée, maitake mushroom, herb & carrot salad

Il Dolce

Chocolate layer cake, chocolate sauce

* Guest count required 14 days before the event, or one option will be served to all guests. Choice at the table is an additional 20%.

Menu 2

Antipasto — Please select one

Truffle salad, radicchio, endive frisée, Pecorino, truffle vinaigrette or Legumi: ricotta & spinach cappelletti, confit cherry tomatoes, aglio e olio

Carne o Pesce — Guests choose between selected meat or fish via RSVP

Herb & roasted garlic crusted lamb, celeriac cream, heirloom carrots, pea purée, lamb jus, pea shoots or Costata di vitello : grilled veal chop, peperonata, roasted garlic mash, Marsala-glazed cremini, red wine sauce or Branzino Mediterraneo, grilled branzino, braised fennel, sautéed cavolo nero, puttanesca

Il Dolce

Olive oil cake, lemon cream, citrus zest, semolina, rosemary chips & fig

* Guest count required 14 days before the event, or one option will be served to all guests. Choice at the table is an additional 20%.

Menu 3

Antipasto — Please select one

Salmon crudo, Aperol spritz vinaigrette, mujjol caviar, orange segments, basil or Burrata, heirloom tomatoes, basil, croutons, black olives

Pasta — Please select one

Spinach ricotta cappelletti, confit tomato, aglio e olio or Cavatelli: hand-made cavatelli, wild mushrooms, arugula, olive oil, garlic, truffle oil

Carne o Pesce — Guests choose between selected meat or fish via RSVP

Pan-seared filet mignon, potato galette, Swiss chard, red wine sauce, chimichurri or Branzino Chileano, miso-marinated Chilean sea bass, bok choy, shiitake mushrooms, carrot salad, micro cilantro

Il Dolce

Pistachio cake, raspberry jelly, pistachio ganache, mascarpone cream

* Guest count required 14 days before the event, or one option will be served to all guests. Choice at the table is an additional 20%.
